description: Create a radar plotting training exercise for OOW cadets in Bridge Command by establishing a new scenario at /opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/o) Solent Radar Plotting Exercise/. The scenario must be set in the Solent at night (01:00-04:00) with 2.0-4.0nm visibility and calm weather (<= 1.0). Configure the own ship 'MV Dorado' at 50.800 N, 1.150 W on a heading of 270 at 12.0 kts. Include four traffic vessels: Target 1 (head-on from West at ~14 kts), Target 2 (crossing from Starboard/NW at ~10 kts), Target 3 (overtaking from East at ~18 kts), and Target 4 (crossing from Port/SW at ~6 kts). Ensure radar settings are configured with ARPA enabled, full radar enabled, a range resolution of 256, and a max range of 48. Document the exercise solutions at /home/ga/Documents/radar_plotting_solutions.txt, including the initial range and bearing, CPA and TCPA, target aspect, and required COLREGS action for each vessel based on the scenario geometry.
